name: Shanghai QiFan Cable Co., Ltd
summary: Shanghai QiFan Cable Co., Ltd manufactures and sells wires and cables worldwide. The company also offers low, medium, and extra high voltage power cables; control cables; instrumentation cables; building wires; flexible rubber cables; fire rated cables; renewable cables; industrial and LAN cables; and coaxial cables, etc. The company also exports its products. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in Shanghai, China.
